title: Intraday decision-time
question: How early in the day can you call the close — and can you trade it?
finding: Conditional. By 11:30 ET the morning move calls the close 79% of the time, but ~69 of those points are pure overlap arithmetic; the leftover gap is a real continuation edge worth +5.4 bp gross (CI [+1.1,+10.0], clears zero on 5/5 seeds, stronger out-of-sample, biggest in small caps). After realistic costs only the >$500B megacap bucket survives, at +1.8 bp net.
